exploration_notes: Traced the dependency chain from grpcurl -> grpc-go -> golang.org/x/net/http2. grpcurl is a client-only tool that uses grpc.DialContext() to connect to servers, which creates an http2Client transport. grpc-go's server transport (http2_server.go) does NOT use http2.Server.ServeConn - it implements its own framing via http2.Framer directly. The vulnerable symbol (http2.Server.ServeConn) is never called by either grpcurl or grpc-go. The triage report is written to /workspace/logs/agent/triage.md.
